TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Wi-lin-tun, title = Wi-lin-tun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wi-lin-tun} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Wi-lin-tun "Ing a kamu, Wellington, Maw-li a kamu, Te Whanganui-a-Tara anucaay Poneke" nu Niw-si-lan a angangan a tukay, tini i Niw-si-lan amis a subal subalay a satip satimulan, Ky-ke a bayu atu Lye-mu-ta-a buyu'an, nu Niw-si-lan ciniza nu sakatulu nu tabakiay a tukay, Syw-li atu Mu-al-pen mapulungmala u ta-si-yang a lalangawan a angangan. ciniza kitakitay nu satimulan situngusay tu angangan nu kanatal, tukay siakutiay atu nu bayuay a demiad, nu kitakitay palalecad tu kalamkam nu bali u satabakiay a tukay. nilaculan Huy-lin-tun saayaway u nu Ay-te-hwa.Ci-pen.Wi-ke-bey-al-te patizeng tu Niw-si-lang kusi nu daayaway miditekay a saydan Wi-lyen.Mey-en.S-mi-s i 1840 a mihcaan patizeng. katukuh 2021 a mihca 6 a bulad, Huy-lin-tun a kitizaan "uyza dada' pasu Huy-lin-tun labu nu tukay a kitizaan" iza ku muenengaytu a tademaw 21.59 emang ku tademaw. tukay a kitizaan pasu Pow-li-lu-a. pabaw Ha-te atu sasa Ha-te a tukay, muenengay tu a tademaw 432,800 ku tademaw. uyni a tukay makay 1865 a m ihcaan amahiza tu nu Niw- kanatal nu si-lan a angangan nu tukay uyni a ngangan caay kapaketun i hulicen, uyza nu hulic a sapinang, imahini Niw-si-lan cen-bu atu i-huy, satalakaway a huing atu zuma kapulungan nu miedapay a sakaput tini amin a tukay patizeng. caay ku cen-bu sakaput dada', Huy-lin-tun iza henay hamin satabakiay kanatal atu kasumamadan lalangawan a sakaput, mahiniay kanatal pisupedan tu nisulitan, kanatal a piazihan tu cudad, kanatal nu pow-u-kwan atu yadah ku piigian. yadah ku nipatizeng niza tu nalimaan atu lalangawan a sakaput, pasu Niw-si-lan nu migitaay atu Niw-si-lan hungti a luma' a palye-u a sakaput. tukayay a nipatizeng aazihan pasu malumanay cen-bu tungduh a luma', kitakitay nu satabakiay anu kilangay a nipatizeng, atu Niw-si-lan pitatengilan nu kanatal pulung a nipatizeng atu kitakit nu singanganay a Bu-tu-na kiwkay, uyni a tukay icelang ku nalimaan a nilaculan, iza ku lasubu a luma' pipaazihan tu nalimaan. zuma hamin u adidi'ay ku misatekeday, katuud ku nalimaan itini mana'nel a mauzip, ciniza iza ku maibukay kuhih a lalangawan atu masazuma ku nikauzip tu labiiay. Huy-lin-tun i tabakiay kalaludan u saayaway tu ku mudadiway, zuma kezayangangan u miedapay ku kawaw, angangan u gingku, misiwbayay a kawaw, cen-bu atu iga a kawaw, caay kuyni dada', Huy-lin-tun nu Niw-si-lana a angangan nu minatu, mikawaw i labu nu kanatal atu kitakit nu miculu'ay nu hikuki. uyni a tukay angangan uyni a kanatal tu sakatulu nunayay a lawad nu pahikukian Huy-lin-tun a pahikukian pawapen tu saedapan. Huy-lin-tun a saculilad calay pasu pabesut katukuh i Ka-pi-ti-a tukus nu bayu atu Hwa-la-la-pw a takunu silamalay atu basu a zazan, atu matatules katukuh timul subal a balunga. kung-yen 10 se-ci, Pow-li-ni-si-ya tayni mana'nel. 1840 a mihcaan, Ing-kow mala tiniay nu Maw-li a tademaw matatelek u tumuk zikuz, katuuday nu mabulaway nu Ing-kow tayni itini. saayaway, Ing-kow pangangan hank ku itiniay u "Pu-lye-tin-li-ya" han, u imi "Ing-kow a ckitizaan" han, anuayaw haymaw ahemal ku nipatizedng tu ziyazu'. malahad katukuh ayza. 1840 a mihcaan nama kademec namangangayaw Na-pow-lun a Ing-kow sakakaay a hitay ci A-se.-Wi-al-s-li, saayaway a ziday Huy-lin-tun nu kakitaan a ngangan pangangan tuyniay a niyazu'. MAaw-li a tademaw nu ayzaay a kakitizaan nu Huy-lin-tun u Te Upoko o te Ika a Maui, imi Maui tangah nu buting. 1840 Te Upoko o te Ika a Maui,śĄŹśÄĚśėĮMauiÁöĄť≠öť†≠. malslitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == wi-r~…ĺin-tun "iŇč a kamu, w…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺiŇčton, maw-r~…ĺi a kamu, t…ô wńßaŇčanui-a-tara anu ¶aaj pon…ôk…ô" nu niw-si-r~…ĺan a aŇčaŇčan a tukaj, tini i niw-si-r~…ĺan amis a subar~…ĺ subar~…ĺaj a satip satimur~…ĺan, kj-k…ô a baju atu r~…ĺj…ô-mu-ta-a buju Ē~ °an, nu niw-si-r~…ĺan ¶iniza nu sakatur~…ĺu nu tabakiaj a tukaj, sjw-r~…ĺi atu mu-ar~…ĺ-p…ôn mapur~…ĺuŇčmar~…ĺa u ta-si-jaŇč a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a aŇčaŇčan. ¶iniza kitakitaj nu satimur~…ĺan situŇčusaj tu aŇčaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ, tukaj siakutiaj atu nu bajuaj a d…ômiad, nu kitakitaj par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu kar~…ĺamkam nu bar~…ĺi u satabakiaj a tukaj. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ńßuj-r~…ĺin-tun saajawaj u nu aj-t…ô-ńßwa. ¶i-p…ôn.wi-k…ô-b…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô patiz…ôŇč tu niw-si-r~…ĺaŇč kusi nu daajawaj midit…ôkaj a sajdan wi-r~…ĺj…ôn.m…ô-…ôn.s-mi-s i **** a mińß ¶aan patiz…ôŇč. katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad, ńßuj-r~…ĺin-tun a kitizaan "ujza dada Ē~ ° pasu ńßuj-r~…ĺin-tun r~…ĺabu nu tukaj a kitizaan" iza ku mu…ôn…ôŇčajtu a tad…ômaw **.** …ômaŇč ku tad…ômaw. tukaj a kitizaan pasu pow-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺu-a. pabaw ńßa-t…ô atu sasa ńßa-t…ô a tukaj, mu…ôn…ôŇčaj tu a tad…ômaw ***,*** ku tad…ômaw. ujni a tukaj makaj **** a m ińß ¶aan amańßiza tu nu niw- kanatar~…ĺ nu si-r~…ĺan a aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj ujni a ŇčaŇčan ¶aaj kapak…ôtun i ńßur~…ĺi ¶…ôn, ujza nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ a sapinaŇč, imańßini niw-si-r~…ĺan ¶…ôn-bu atu i-ńßuj, satar~…ĺakawaj a ńßuiŇč atu zuma kapur~…ĺuŇčan nu mi…ôdapaj a sakaput tini amin a tukaj patiz…ôŇč. ¶aaj ku ¶…ôn-bu sakaput dada Ē~ °, ńßuj-r~…ĺin-tun iza ńß…ônaj ńßamin satabakiaj kanatar~…ĺ atu kasumamadan r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a sakaput, mańßiniaj kanatar~…ĺ pisup…ôdan tu nisur~…ĺitan, kanatar~…ĺ a piazińßan tu ¶udad, kanatar~…ĺ nu pow-u-kwan atu jadańß ku piigian. jadańß ku nipatiz…ôŇč niza tu nar~…ĺimaan atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a sakaput, pasu niw-si-r~…ĺan nu migitaaj atu niw-si-r~…ĺan ńßuŇčti a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a par~…ĺj…ô-u a sakaput. tukajaj a nipatiz…ôŇč aazińßan pasu mar~…ĺumanaj ¶…ôn-bu tuŇčduńß a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, kitakitaj nu satabakiaj anu kir~…ĺaŇčaj a nipatiz…ôŇč, atu niw-si-r~…ĺan pitat…ôŇčir~…ĺan nu kanatar~…ĺ pur~…ĺuŇč a nipatiz…ôŇč atu kitakit nu siŇčaŇčanaj a bu-tu-na kiwkaj, ujni a tukaj i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku nar~…ĺimaan a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan, iza ku r~…ĺasubu a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° pipaazińßan tu nar~…ĺimaan. zuma ńßamin u adidi Ē~ °aj ku misat…ôk…ôdaj, katuud ku nar~…ĺimaan itini mana Ē~ °n…ôr~…ĺ a mauzip, ¶iniza iza ku maibukaj kuńßińß a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu masazuma ku nikauzip tu r~…ĺabiiaj. ńßuj-r~…ĺin-tun i tabakiaj kar~…ĺar~…ĺudan u saajawaj tu ku mudadiwaj, zuma k…ôzajaŇčaŇčan u mi…ôdapaj ku kawaw, aŇčaŇčan u giŇčku, misiwbajaj a kawaw, ¶…ôn-bu atu iga a kawaw, ¶aaj kujni dada Ē~ °, ńßuj-r~…ĺin-tun nu niw-si-r~…ĺana a aŇčaŇčan nu minatu, mikawaw i r~…ĺabu nu kanatar~…ĺ atu kitakit nu mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj nu ńßikuki. ujni a tukaj aŇčaŇčan ujni a kanatar~…ĺ tu sakatur~…ĺu nunajaj a r~…ĺawad nu pańßikukian ńßuj-r~…ĺin-tun a pańßikukian pawap…ôn tu sa…ôdapan. ńßuj-r~…ĺin-tun a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺad ¶ar~…ĺaj pasu pab…ôsut katukuńß i ka-pi-ti-a tukus nu baju atu ńßwa-r~…ĺa-r~…ĺa-pw a takunu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj atu basu a zazan, atu matatur~…ĺ…ôs katukuńß timur~…ĺ subar~…ĺ a bar~…ĺuŇča. kuŇč-j…ôn ** s…ô- ¶i, pow-r~…ĺi-ni-si-ja tajni mana Ē~ °n…ôr~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶aan, iŇč-kow mar~…ĺa tiniaj nu maw-r~…ĺi a tad…ômaw matat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk u tumuk zikuz, katuudaj nu mabur~…ĺawaj nu iŇč-kow tajni itini. saajawaj, iŇč-kow paŇčaŇčan ńßank ku itiniaj u "pu-r~…ĺj…ô-tin-r~…ĺi-ja" ńßan, u imi "iŇč-kow a ¶kitizaan" ńßan, anuajaw ńßajmaw ańß…ômar~…ĺ ku nipatiz…ôdŇč tu zijazu Ē~ °. mar~…ĺańßad katukuńß ajza. **** a mińß ¶aan nama kad…ôm…ô ¶ namaŇčaŇčajaw na-pow-r~…ĺun a iŇč-kow sakakaaj a ńßitaj ¶i a-s…ô.-wi-ar~…ĺ-s-r~…ĺi, saajawaj a zidaj ńßuj-r~…ĺin-tun nu kakitaan a ŇčaŇčan paŇčaŇčan tujniaj a nijazu Ē~ °. maaw-r~…ĺi a tad…ômaw nu ajzaaj a kakitizaan nu ńßuj-r~…ĺin-tun u t…ô upoko o t…ô ika a maui, imi maui taŇčańß nu butiŇč. **** t…ô upoko o t…ô ika a maui,***maui***. mar~…ĺsr~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Wi-lin-tun "Ing a kamu, Wellington, Maw-li a kamu, Te Whanganui-a-Tara anucaay Poneke" nu Niw-si-lan a angangan a tukay, tini i Niw-si-lan amis a subal subalay a satip satimulan, Ky-ke a bayu atu Lye-mu-ta-a buyu'an, nu Niw-si-lan ciniza nu sakatulu nu tabakiay a tukay, Syw-li atu Mu-al-pen mapulungmala u ta-si-yang a lalangawan a angangan. ciniza kitakitay nu satimulan situngusay tu angangan nu kanatal, tukay siakutiay atu nu bayuay a demiad, nu kitakitay palalecad tu kalamkam nu bali u satabakiay a tukay. nilaculan Huy-lin-tun saayaway u nu Ay-te-hwa.Ci-pen.Wi-ke-bey-al-te patizeng tu Niw-si-lang kusi nu daayaway miditekay a saydan Wi-lyen.Mey-en.S-mi-s i 1840 a mihcaan patizeng. katukuh 2021 a mihca 6 a bulad, Huy-lin-tun a kitizaan "uyza dada' pasu Huy-lin-tun labu nu tukay a kitizaan" iza ku muenengaytu a tademaw 21.59 emang ku tademaw. tukay a kitizaan pasu Pow-li-lu-a. pabaw Ha-te atu sasa Ha-te a tukay, muenengay tu a tademaw 432,800 ku tademaw. uyni a tukay makay 1865 a m ihcaan amahiza tu nu Niw- kanatal nu si-lan a angangan nu tukay uyni a ngangan caay kapaketun i hulicen, uyza nu hulic a sapinang, imahini Niw-si-lan cen-bu atu i-huy, satalakaway a huing atu zuma kapulungan nu miedapay a sakaput tini amin a tukay patizeng. caay ku cen-bu sakaput dada', Huy-lin-tun iza henay hamin satabakiay kanatal atu kasumamadan lalangawan a sakaput, mahiniay kanatal pisupedan tu nisulitan, kanatal a piazihan tu cudad, kanatal nu pow-u-kwan atu yadah ku piigian. yadah ku nipatizeng niza tu nalimaan atu lalangawan a sakaput, pasu Niw-si-lan nu migitaay atu Niw-si-lan hungti a luma' a palye-u a sakaput. tukayay a nipatizeng aazihan pasu malumanay cen-bu tungduh a luma', kitakitay nu satabakiay anu kilangay a nipatizeng, atu Niw-si-lan pitatengilan nu kanatal pulung a nipatizeng atu kitakit nu singanganay a Bu-tu-na kiwkay, uyni a tukay icelang ku nalimaan a nilaculan, iza ku lasubu a luma' pipaazihan tu nalimaan. zuma hamin u adidi'ay ku misatekeday, katuud ku nalimaan itini mana'nel a mauzip, ciniza iza ku maibukay kuhih a lalangawan atu masazuma ku nikauzip tu labiiay. Huy-lin-tun i tabakiay kalaludan u saayaway tu ku mudadiway, zuma kezayangangan u miedapay ku kawaw, angangan u gingku, misiwbayay a kawaw, cen-bu atu iga a kawaw, caay kuyni dada', Huy-lin-tun nu Niw-si-lana a angangan nu minatu, mikawaw i labu nu kanatal atu kitakit nu miculu'ay nu hikuki. uyni a tukay angangan uyni a kanatal tu sakatulu nunayay a lawad nu pahikukian Huy-lin-tun a pahikukian pawapen tu saedapan. Huy-lin-tun a saculilad calay pasu pabesut katukuh i Ka-pi-ti-a tukus nu bayu atu Hwa-la-la-pw a takunu silamalay atu basu a zazan, atu matatules katukuh timul subal a balunga. kung-yen 10 se-ci, Pow-li-ni-si-ya tayni mana'nel. 1840 a mihcaan, Ing-kow mala tiniay nu Maw-li a tademaw matatelek u tumuk zikuz, katuuday nu mabulaway nu Ing-kow tayni itini. saayaway, Ing-kow pangangan hank ku itiniay u "Pu-lye-tin-li-ya" han, u imi "Ing-kow a ckitizaan" han, anuayaw haymaw ahemal ku nipatizedng tu ziyazu'. malahad katukuh ayza. 1840 a mihcaan nama kademec namangangayaw Na-pow-lun a Ing-kow sakakaay a hitay ci A-se.-Wi-al-s-li, saayaway a ziday Huy-lin-tun nu kakitaan a ngangan pangangan tuyniay a niyazu'. MAaw-li a tademaw nu ayzaay a kakitizaan nu Huy-lin-tun u Te Upoko o te Ika a Maui, imi Maui tangah nu buting. 1840 Te Upoko o te Ika a Maui,śĄŹśÄĚśėĮMauiÁöĄť≠öť†≠. malslitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

atu kasumamadan r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a sakaput, mańßiniaj kanatar~…ĺ pisup…ôdan tu nisur~…ĺitan, kanatar~…ĺ a piazińßan tu ¶udad, kanatar~…ĺ nu pow-u-kwan atu jadańß ku piigian. jadańß ku nipatiz…ôŇč niza kanatar~…ĺ atu kitakit nu mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj nu ńßikuki. ujni a tukaj aŇčaŇčan ujni a kanatar~…ĺ tu sakatur~…ĺu nunajaj a r~…ĺawad nu pańßikukian ńßuj-r~…ĺin-tun a pańßikukian pawap…ôn tu sa…ôdapan. ńßuj-r~…ĺin-tun a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺad ¶ar~…ĺaj pasu pab…ôsut katukuńß i ka-pi-ti-a tukus nu baju atu ńßwa-r~…ĺa-r~…ĺa-pw a takunu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj atu basu a zazan, atu matatur~…ĺ…ôs katukuńß timur~…ĺ subar~…ĺ a bar~…ĺuŇča. kuŇč-j…ôn ** s…ô- ¶i, pow-r~…ĺi-ni-si-ja tajni mana Ē~ °n…ôr~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶aan, iŇč-kow mar~…ĺa tiniaj nu maw-r~…ĺi a tad…ômaw matat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk u tumuk zikuz, katuudaj nu mabur~…ĺawaj nu iŇč-kow tajni itini. saajawaj, iŇč-kow paŇčaŇčan ńßank ku itiniaj u "pu-r~…ĺj…ô-tin-r~…ĺi-ja" ńßan, u imi "iŇč-kow a ¶kitizaan" ńßan, anuajaw ńßajmaw ańß…ômar~…ĺ ku nipatiz…ôdŇč tu zijazu Ē~ °. mar~…ĺańßad katukuńß ajza. **** a mińß ¶aan nama kad…ôm…ô ¶ namaŇčaŇčajaw na-pow-r~…ĺun a iŇč-kow sakakaaj a ńßitaj ¶i a-s…ô.-wi-ar~…ĺ-s-r~…ĺi, saajawaj a zidaj ńßuj-r~…ĺin-tun nu kakitaan a ŇčaŇčan paŇčaŇčan tujniaj a nijazu Ē~ °. maaw-r~…ĺi a tad…ômaw nu ajzaaj a kakitizaan nu ńßuj-r~…ĺin-tun u t…ô upoko o t…ô ika a maui, imi maui taŇčańß nu butiŇč. **** t…ô upoko o t…ô ika a maui,***maui***. mar~…ĺsr~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
